jobs.prompt: Review this proposal as a portfolio editor. Find over-scope, under-specified demo promises, and missing player-facing clarity. Return concise Korean with sections: 강점 / 문제점 / 바로 고칠 문서 / 결정 보류.
Review combat readability, camera distance, HUD, screen composition, boss telegraphing, and the impact of weapon switching. Return concise Korean with sections: 강점 / 문제점 / 바로 고칠 문서 / 결정 보류.
Review party flow, entry ready-check, reconnect, revive, wipe recovery, and quick communication. Return concise Korean with sections: 강점 / 문제점 / 바로 고칠 문서 / 결정 보류.

Review the proposal from a data-table and content-authoring perspective. Find missing design tables, missing columns, or table structures that should exist before implementation. Return concise Korean with sections: 이미 충분한 표 / 추가해야 할 표 / 각 표의 핵심 컬럼 / 결정 보류.
